kind: Python Flask chatbot with a FAISS RAG pipeline
note: Pre-registered BEFORE any recall ran. Each gold_path is the file a returning developer would need opened to answer. isolation=true marks questions whose answer exists ONLY in this repo (used for cross-scope leak checks). Known hazard, recorded up front: app_backup.py is a near-duplicate of app.py, so app.py golds may lose ranks to the duplicate.

questions.question: Which Flask route receives chat messages from the browser, and which model does it call?
How do we build the vector index from the PDF knowledge base?
Where is the retrieval chain that answers questions from the saved local vector index?
How does the frontend decide whether to call the local server or the production chat domain?
Where is the terms-of-use and privacy text shown in the chat popup defined?
Which origins are allowed to call the chat endpoint cross-origin?
Where do we verify that the AI provider key loads correctly from the env file?
Which script runs a minimal chat demo that keeps the whole conversation in memory and serves its own inline page?
How do we display which source documents an answer was based on?
Where do we strip out links that lead to dead or paywalled pages before sending a reply?
